allow: Bash("C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\15\\bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -d avelio_db -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total_receipts FROM receipts;")
Bash(cmd /c "set PGPASSWORD=postgres123 && ""C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\15\\bin\\psql.exe"" -U postgres -d avelio_db -c ""SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total_receipts FROM receipts;""")

Bash(cmd /c "cd /d D:\\avelio-credit\\avelio-backend && node -e ""const { Pool } = require\(''pg''\); const pool = new Pool\({host:''localhost'',port:5432,database:''avelio_db'',user:''postgres'',password:''postgres123''}\); pool.query\(''SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total_receipts FROM receipts''\).then\(r => {console.log\(r.rows[0]\); pool.end\(\)}\).catch\(e => {console.error\(e\); pool.end\(\)}\)""")

Bash(powershell -Command "Set-Location ''D:\\avelio-credit\\avelio-backend''; node -e ""const { Pool } = require\(''pg''\); const pool = new Pool\({host:''localhost'',port:5432,database:''avelio_db'',user:''postgres'',password:''postgres123''}\); pool.query\(\\""SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total FROM receipts WHERE payment_method = ''bank_transfer'' AND date_issued BETWEEN ''2025-12-01'' AND ''2025-12-31''\\""\).then\(r => {console.log\(r.rows[0]\); pool.end\(\)}\).catch\(e => {console.error\(e\); pool.end\(\)}\)""")
Bash(cmd.exe /c "cd /d D:\\avelio-credit\\avelio-backend && dir .env 2>nul && echo .env exists || echo .env NOT found")
Bash(cmd.exe /c "start ""Avelio Backend"" cmd /k ""cd /d D:\\avelio-credit\\avelio-backend && npm start""")
Bash(cmd.exe /c "cd /d D:\\avelio-credit\\avelio-backend && start cmd /k npm start")
Bash(cmd.exe /c "cd /d D:\\avelio-credit\\avelio-backend && start cmd /k node src/server.js")
Bash(powershell -Command "Start-Process cmd -ArgumentList ''/k cd /d D:\\avelio-credit\\avelio-backend ^&^& node src/server.js''")
Bash(cmd.exe /c "curl -s http://localhost:5001/api/v1/health 2>nul || echo Backend not responding")
